Class MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.mongodb.atlas.MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
MongoDBAtlasVectorStore
public static class MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder>
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Chris Smith, Soby Chacko, Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, chabinhwang

  • Method Details

    • collectionName

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder collectionName(String collectionName)
      Configures the collection name. This must match the name of the collection for the Vector Search Index in Atlas.
      Parameters:
      collectionName - the name of the collection
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if collectionName is null or empty

    • vectorIndexName

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder vectorIndexName(String vectorIndexName)
      Configures the vector index name. This must match the name of the Vector Search Index Name in Atlas.
      Parameters:
      vectorIndexName - the name of the vector index
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if vectorIndexName is null or empty

    • pathName

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder pathName(String pathName)
      Configures the path name. This must match the name of the field indexed for the Vector Search Index in Atlas.
      Parameters:
      pathName - the name of the path
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pathName is null or empty

    • numCandidates

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder numCandidates(int numCandidates)
      Sets the number of candidates for vector search.
      Parameters:
      numCandidates - the number of candidates
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • metadataFieldsToFilter

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder metadataFieldsToFilter(List<String> metadataFieldsToFilter)
      Sets the metadata fields to filter in vector search.
      Parameters:
      metadataFieldsToFilter - list of metadata field names
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if metadataFieldsToFilter is null or empty

    • initializeSchema

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • filterExpressionConverter

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder filterExpressionConverter(MongoDBAtlasFilterExpressionConverter converter)
      Sets the filter expression converter.
      Parameters:
      converter - the filter expression converter to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if converter is null

    • build

      public MongoDBAtlasVectorStore build()
      Builds the MongoDBAtlasVectorStore instance.
      Returns:
      a new MongoDBAtlasVectorStore instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the builder is in an invalid state
